description: You are a Project Manager auditing the 'System_Architecture.pdf' document in the Projects workspace. A dispute has arisen regarding the original specifications. Identify the username of the person who created Version 1.0 of this document and save ONLY the username to /home/ga/version_author.txt. Note: The document has been modified since then, so ensure you identify the specific author of Version 1.0 rather than the most recent contributor.
